Name: LU 110 - Landmarks, 511 West 171 Street ANCP Cluster, Manhattan (G 260003 NUM).
Title: Resolution approving an Urban Development Action Area Project pursuant to Article 16 of the General Municipal Law for property located at 511 West 171st Street (Block 2128, Lot 55), 501 West 174th Street (Block 2131, Lot 50), and 522 West 174th Street (Block 2130, Lot 39), Borough of Manhattan; and waiving the urban development action area designation requirement and the Uniform Land Use Review Procedure, Community District 12, Borough of Manhattan (L.U. No. 110; G 260003 NUM).
